criteria.name: Personalized Recommendations
criteria.description: The app provides tailored product suggestions based on user preferences, browsing history, and shopping behavior.

criteria.name: AI-Powered Search
criteria.description: The app uses AI to understand natural language queries and provide relevant search results, including visual search capabilities.

criteria.name: Virtual Try-On
criteria.description: The app offers virtual try-on features using augmented reality (AR) or AI to visualize how clothing or beauty products look on the user.

criteria.name: AI Chatbots
criteria.description: The app incorporates AI-driven chatbots for customer support, personalized shopping assistance, and answering product-related questions.

criteria.name: Outfit Recommendations
criteria.description: The app suggests complete outfit ideas based on the user's wardrobe, style preferences, and current trends, often considering weather conditions.

criteria.name: Wardrobe Management
criteria.description: The app helps users organize their digital closet by allowing them to upload clothing items, track purchase dates/costs, and get insights into their wardrobe usage.

criteria.name: Competitor Analysis
criteria.description: AI is used to analyze competitors by tracking keyword rankings, app store visuals, and user feedback.
